Podcast Operations · Workflow

Podcast Production Workflow Management

Problem Episodes had no consistent publishing pipeline — tasks were scattered across emails and DMs with no central tracker.
My role Built and managed a full podcast ops workflow: recording coordination, editing handoff via Riverside, WordPress publishing, YouTube uploads, and IMDb guest profile updates.
Result Consistent episode cadence, faster publishing, and zero missed uploads over the engagement.
Notion Google Sheets Riverside YouTube WordPress IMDb

Content Strategy · AI-Assisted

AI-Assisted Episode Content Repurposing

Problem Podcast content was being underutilized — only the audio was published, with no supporting content strategy.
My role Turned each episode into a full content set: show notes, YouTube description, social captions, short-form hooks, and a publishing checklist — using AI tools to streamline the process.
Result 5× content output per episode with consistent tone and faster turnaround.
ChatGPT Notion Google Docs WordPress
Task Due Owner Platform Status

Edit audio Jun 5 Editor Riverside ✓ Done

Project Management · Content Teams

Project Management Dashboard for Content Teams

Problem Content team had no shared visibility on task ownership, deadlines, or publication status across platforms.
My role Built and maintained a content calendar and task tracker covering recording, editing, publishing, and promotion — with clear owners, due dates, and platform tags.
Result Zero missed deadlines and clearer accountability across the team.
Notion Google Sheets Asana
Client work · Turix Crystals

E-Commerce · Design · Canva

E-Commerce Visual Design & Ad Creatives

Problem Turix Crystals needed multilingual ad creatives, product visuals, and promotional designs for multiple markets — fast.
My role Designed and translated ad creatives, ebook covers, gift cards, and social media assets in Canva for English, Portuguese, and Hungarian markets.
Result Multi-language campaigns launched on Facebook and Instagram with consistent branding across all assets.
Canva Facebook Ads ActiveCampaign Shopify
Client work · Turix Crystals

E-Commerce · Shopify

Shopify Product Management & Catalog Organization

Problem Product catalog had mixed statuses, inconsistent categorization, and listing gaps across 15 sales markets.
My role Added, organized, and maintained 50+ products in Shopify — managing statuses (Active/Draft), categories, funnel types, and multi-language product details.
Result Clean, organized catalog with proper category structure and active listings ready for all 15 markets.
Shopify ActiveCampaign Translation
Client work · Pawtrait

Fulfillment · Shopify · Photoshop

Pet Portrait Fulfillment & Order Operations

Problem Custom pet portrait orders required per-order optimization and coordination with a third-party print vendor — a process that was slow and error-prone.
My role Managed end-to-end Shopify order fulfillment: optimizing portrait files in Photoshop to customer specs, submitting orders to PosterXXL, and tracking delivery.
Result Smooth, on-time fulfillment with consistent quality across all customer orders.
Shopify Adobe Photoshop PosterXXL

Project Management · Case Study · Documentation

Operations Manual Migration to Google Sites

ProblemTeam operations knowledge lived in scattered documents, emails, and personal notes — making onboarding slow and creating single points of failure when team members were unavailable.
My roleConsolidated all SOPs, workflows, tool guides, and process documentation into a structured, searchable Google Sites internal hub — organized by department and role for easy navigation.
ResultSingle source of truth for team operations. New hires could onboard independently. Recurring questions dropped significantly as teams self-served through the hub.
Google Sites Google Docs Google Drive Notion

About

Organized, reliable, and genuinely invested in your success.

I'm Charry, a Virtual Assistant from the Philippines with a BS in Environmental Engineering from MSU-IIT. My engineering background means I bring systematic thinking to everything I manage — whether that's a podcast pipeline, a Shopify catalog, or a content team's project board.

I specialize in podcast operations and project management for content creators and small teams who need someone they can actually hand things off to.
